name: Painted Peach Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package cake mix (your choice of yellow, pineapple, white, or other)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the dry cake mix with cream cheese and eggs. Blend on low speed for 30 seconds, then beat on high speed for 2 minutes.
4. Spoon about two-thirds of the batter into the prepared pan. Arrange peach slices over the batter.
5. Sprinkle cinnamon candies over the peach slices. Spoon the remaining cake batter over the top.
6. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool on a rack upright for 15 minutes before removing it from the pan.
8. Drizzle with glaze made by mixing confectioner's sugar and lemon juice.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature with whipped cream or ice cream, if desired.
